'''jalatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaamchor|kaamchor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaamchor|kaamchor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jalatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jælæthæth|jælæthæth]] || [[word:jælæthæj|jælæthæj]] || [[word:jælæthæsh|jælæthæsh]] || [[word:jælæthæ|jælæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jalalathath|jalalathath]] || [[word:jalalathaj|jalalathaj]] || [[word:jalalathash|jalalathash]] || [[word:jalalatha|jalalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jalathath|jalathath]] || [[word:jalathaj|jalathaj]] || [[word:jalathash|jalathash]] || [[word:jalatha|jalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalafthath|jalafthath]] || [[word:jalafthaj|jalafthaj]] || [[word:jalafthash|jalafthash]] || [[word:jalafthaf|jalafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jalathatha|jalathatha]] || [[word:jalathaja|jalathaja]] || [[word:jalathasha|jalathasha]] || [[word:jalathaka|jalathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jalathath|jalathath]] || [[word:jalathaj|jalathaj]] || [[word:jalathash|jalathash]] || [[word:jalatha|jalatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jalathathal|jalathathal]] || [[word:jalathajal|jalathajal]] || [[word:jalathashal|jalathashal]] || [[word:jalathakal|jalathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jalathathatha|jalathathatha]] || [[word:jalathajaja|jalathajaja]] || [[word:jalathashasha|jalathashasha]] || [[word:jalathaka|jalathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jalathathan|jalathathan]] || [[word:jalathajan|jalathajan]] || [[word:jalathashan|jalathashan]] || [[word:jalathakan|jalathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jalathathaoro|jalathathaoro]] || [[word:jalathajaoro|jalathajaoro]] || [[word:jalathashaoro|jalathashaoro]] || [[word:jalathakaoro|jalathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
